title: Win11Forge Startup Blacklist
description: Schema for configuring applications to disable from Windows startup

DisabledApplications.description: List of applications to manage in Windows startup. Names support wildcards (e.g., *Battle*, Discord*).

Notes.description: Human-readable usage notes for this configuration file

StartupEntry.description: A startup application entry to be managed

Name.description: Application name or wildcard pattern to match against startup entries

Reason.description: Human-readable reason for disabling the application from startup

ShouldDisable.description: Whether to disable this application from startup (false keeps the entry for documentation only)
